title: Suspicious or Empty User Agent Detected
description: Detects requests with empty, missing, or known-malicious user agents. Automated attack tools often use non-standard user agents or omit them entirely.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI Load Balancer Access Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Load Balancer Access Logs') and (('User Agent' = '') or (('User Agent' like '*<?php*' or 'User Agent' like '*${jndi*' or 'User Agent' like '*<script*' or 'User Agent' like '*() { :;}*' or 'User Agent' like '*shellshock*' or 'User Agent' like '*masscan*' or 'User Agent' like '*zgrab*' or 'User Agent' like '*censys*' or 'User Agent' like '*shodan*' or 'User Agent' like '*internetmeasurement*')))
falsepositives: Internal monitoring tools with custom user agents
